tests.summary: PowerShell blocked C:\Program Files\nodejs\npm.ps1 before project code ran.
T06 miniapp-shell tests passed, but the root npm script also runs older server suites; non-T06 T04/T05 tests failed with intermittent 500 responses.
No lint script is present; npm exited 0 with --if-present.

pageEvidence.summary: Declares app launch route, two bottom tabs, C01-C12 shell routes, and all clickable control route/API targets.
Maps local order states to analysis, failure, preview, basic result, full report entry, and full report pages.

apiEvidence.summary: Records local miniapp client calls for order, upload, analysis progress, preview, payment create, basic decision, full generation/report, save, feedback, export, and my reports.

dbEvidence.summary: Local fixture store mutation/readback proves the shell contract updates and reads local-only records.

visualEvidence.summary: T06 records UI reference coverage and truthful screenshot/diff deferral; page-specific screenshots and pixel diffs remain assigned to T07-T14.

ownerJourneyEvidence.summary: Covers owner shell navigation metadata and route/API targets; exact rendered owner click traces remain assigned to T15.
Records tab switch metadata, page jump assertions, API contract calls, and route guard readbacks.

localOnlyEvidence.summary: LOCAL_ONLY=true, SCOREMAP_ADAPTER_MODE=local-mock, local WeChat payment adapter label only, forbidden remote findings=[], secret findings=[].
API client uses local-mock://scoremap semantics and in-memory local fixture store; no Tencent Cloud, WeChat Pay, production domain, or online database call is made.

knownGaps.summary: T06 does not produce real miniapp screenshots, visual diffs, or pixel metrics. Those are page/visual tasks T07-T14.
T06 proves shell owner navigation metadata, not the full O01-O12 rendered click journey. T15 owns exact owner journey traces.
The literal npm command is blocked by host PowerShell execution policy; npm.cmd equivalent was used.
The npm.cmd root test command runs all historical repo tests and still shows non-T06 T04/T05 failures. The focused T06 miniapp-shell test passed.
